title: Pidilite Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Pidilite Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Pidilite Industries are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pidilite Industries:
Pidilite Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pidilite Industries!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
